steps.title: Histogram Equalization
steps.summary: Histogram Equalization belongs to the Data Preprocessing area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Data Preprocessing / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Compare it with Histogram Equalization (numerical form, not just images) and Length Penalty. It opens into Histogram Equalization (numerical form, not just images) and Adaptive Histogram Equalization.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
